---
name: Feature or board request
about: Suggest a feature, or request support for a new board/radio
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> ⚠️ **Please read first.** This is an Alpha, single-maintainer project. Feature and
> new-board requests are genuinely appreciated as signal, but **may not be implemented** —
> there is no roadmap commitment. The fastest path to getting something is usually a **PR**
> (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — new boards are a great first contribution).

**What do you want, and why**
Describe the feature or board/radio, and the use case it unlocks.

**For a new board/radio**
- Board: <!-- name + link -->
- MCU: <!-- e.g. nRF52840, ESP32-S3 -->
- LoRa chip: <!-- e.g. SX1262, LR1110 -->
- RF front-end / FEM / TCXO details, if known: <!-- the chip-specific seam -->
- Can you test on real hardware? <!-- hugely helpful — boards are hard to validate blind -->

**Anything else**
Prior art, links, or notes.
